acceptance_criteria.text: Add paid action preflight for map_reviews_refresh and future paid action keys using the Sprint 4 consent policy.
proof: Added services.operator_paid_preflight with shared PAID_ACTIONS lookup.

acceptance_criteria.text: Preflight checks action key, estimated credits, user balance, consent mode, per-action/day/month limits, and disabled policy.
proof: Unit tests cover allowed and blocked paths.
gaps: Historical daily/monthly usage reservation is not implemented yet.

acceptance_criteria.text: Preflight must be read-only: no Apify calls, no parsequeue insertion, no AI generation, no credit ledger writes, no external writes.
proof: Preflight response explicitly reports execution_enabled=false, paid_actions_performed=false, credit_charged=false, external_calls_performed=false.

acceptance_criteria.text: Add authenticated Operator API endpoint for preflight after business access verification.
proof: Added POST /api/operator/paid-actions/<action_key>/preflight using require_auth_from_request and verify_business_access.
gaps: No live Flask integration fixture added.

acceptance_criteria.text: Add Operator web controls to enter estimated credits and inspect the preflight result before any future execution.
proof: OperatorPage renders estimated credits, explicit consent, preflight button, and result details.

acceptance_criteria.text: Tests and proof evidence cover allowed, blocked, missing estimate, disabled policy, insufficient balance, and no-execution status.

commands_for_fresh_verifier: python3 -m pytest -q tests/test_operator_paid_preflight.py tests/test_operator_consent_policy.py tests/test_operator_paid_actions.py tests/test_operator_attention.py tests/test_telegram_dashboard_copy.py
python3 -m py_compile src/services/operator_paid_preflight.py src/api/operator_api.py src/services/operator_consent_policy.py src/services/operator_paid_actions.py src/services/operator_attention.py
known_gaps: No Apify execution, parsequeue insertion, credit reservation, credit charge, AI generation, or external publication in Sprint 5.
Historical daily/monthly usage accounting remains future execution work.
